caption: A screen recording captures a split-screen layout showing a web browser and a live stream. On the left, the website "RANDOM.ORG" displays a "List Randomizer" featuring a numbered list of NBA teams, including "1. NEW ORLEANS PELICANS" and "2. HOUSTON ROCKETS." On the right, a live stream window shows a man with a beard and dark hair wearing a black t-shirt, appearing as a talking head against a dark background. A chat window is visible above him, featuring a message from "Nightbot" stating, "Click the link for the BREAK, SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2zGdxK9." At the bottom of the screen, a red and yellow banner displays the logo "JASPYS" and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM." As the video progresses, the browser window shifts to show a different randomized list of teams, while the man in the live stream remains stationary, speaking to the camera.
